details.test: Task 1: Submit Phase I ESA quote request for small commercial property
Task 2: Select remediation package with soil & groundwater treatment and regulatory reporting under budget
Task 3: Find nearest emergency spill office within 100 miles of 77002 and save phone note
Task 4: Save brownfield redevelopment case study (2021-2023, Midwest, $1M-$5M)
Task 5: Add three construction manager courses under $300 with 4+ stars to cart
Task 6: Save cleanup cost estimate for 2-acre lead-in-soil site under $100,000
Task 7: Submit on-site compliance audit request for 150-employee manufacturing facility
Task 8: Configure 4-well monitoring plan under $15,000 per year
Task 9: Subscribe to two environmental newsletters with different frequencies
